metadata.description: tểtrtertreterterterter(maintain rules.json manually, không dùng extract-rules.js)

isHideJourneyManagement.description: isHideJourneyManagement: (not VN) or (VN and option VN55 not)

isShowNewNotification.description: isShowNewNotification (VN -> option VN27; khác VN -> option MY12)

isGroupAuthority.description: isGroupAuthority: BV and not (EU and EM)

isSetVisibleCarOnMapByStatus.description: isSetVisibleCarOnMapByStatus ((!VN và mobile) hoặc option VN02E/VN02J hoặc imid 13962)

isMultipleHistoryPath.description: isMultipleHistoryPath (!isOneMonthQuery && (option VN02G hoặc !VN) && option không chứa FY)

isHideQCVNData.description: isHideQCVNData (country VN + imid 26630; location.host gps247.vn runtime)

isExtraLimitSearchTime.description: isExtraLimitSearchTime (VN + imid 20444|15368); CS còn location.host gps247.vn — runtime
